title: Buzz Aldrin's Encounter with a UFO!
summary: A brief discussion about alleged UFO encounters experienced by astronaut Buzz Aldrin, including a disc-shaped object he reportedly chased while piloting a military jet and something that followed the Apollo mission to the Moon. These accounts are attributed to statements made by Aldrin's sister.

acronyms.definition: An unidentified aerial phenomenon or craft

key_claims.claim: Buzz Aldrin's sister said he told her about a UFO encounter while piloting a military jet where he chased a disc-shaped object as high as his plane could safely go
Buzz Aldrin was reportedly rattled to the core by the disc encounter
Buzz Aldrin's sister said something followed them to the Moon during the Apollo mission
The Apollo crew chose not to report to Houston about a light following them
